purpose: Validation set for scorer recalibration v1. Anchored on the live $2-lead Farm Thru ad as the canonical positive — encodes the levers we want the rubric to reward. Comparison cohort = the loop's prior 'production_ready' meta-ads that were NOT approved by FMTH; they should remain credible scores but not dominate the canonical positive.

target.expected_pattern: live ad should clear 0.85 and outscore at least 2 of the 5 prior production_ready ads on the new rubric. If it stays below 0.80, the new dimensions aren't carrying enough weight.

levers_encoded_in_positive.narrow_bold_claim: never been done with a grocery store in Australia (category + geo bounded)

positive.label: live_2_dollar_lead
positive.primary_text:
We're about to open something up that's never been done with a grocery store in Australia.

For the first time, you'll be able to own a piece of the farm-direct grocery model we've built on the Northern Beaches. Eight NSW farms. One hub in Brookvale. A network ready to scale across Sydney.

Registration opens soon. First in gets first access.

Leave your email — we'll tell you the moment it goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
positive.headline: Own a piece of an Aussie-first grocery model
positive.description: Registration opens soon. Leave your email.

comparison_cohort.label: loop_prior_production_ready_0.929
comparison_cohort.primary_text:
Last Tuesday a farmer in Kempsey pulled beef from the cool room. By Thursday it was at the Brookvale hub.

No middlemen. No distribution centre. No weeks in cold storage.

Just 100% grass-fed beef, raised on regenerative pasture, served fresh.

This is what farm-direct actually means.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
comparison_cohort.headline: Paddock on Tuesday, yours by Thursday
comparison_cohort.description: Farm-direct beef from Kempsey to Brookvale.

comparison_cohort.label: loop_prior_production_ready_0.905
comparison_cohort.primary_text:
"I never used to read the label."

That's how it starts for most families. 'Farm fresh' chicken that never saw grass. 'Free range' eggs from warehouses.

I wanted to create what didn't exist: real food, from real farms, with real names you can know.

Rachel raises grass-fed cattle in Kempsey. Farmer Brown's hens roam paddocks in South-Western NSW.

Know who grew your food.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
comparison_cohort.headline: I was lying to my kids about food
comparison_cohort.description: Real food. Real farms. Real names.

comparison_cohort.label: loop_prior_production_ready_0.933
comparison_cohort.primary_text:
Do you know the name of the farm that raised your last steak?

Rachel's cattle graze on regenerative pastures in Kempsey NSW.

No hormones, no feedlots.

Collins catches our salmon wild off the South Coast. Farmer Brown's hens roam paddocks in South-Western NSW.

Every product on FarmThru shows the farm, the farmer, and how the food was raised.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
comparison_cohort.headline: See your farm before you buy
comparison_cohort.description: Every product. Named farm. Real story.

comparison_cohort.label: loop_prior_production_ready_0.937
comparison_cohort.primary_text:
I've been farming cattle in Kempsey for years. When I see beef in supermarkets, I wonder: which farm? What feed? How many trucks and warehouses did it pass through?

That's why I partnered with FarmThru.

My beef leaves the paddock and is at the Brookvale hub in days. Not weeks. Not months.

Know who grew your food.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
comparison_cohort.headline: I wonder about supermarket beef
comparison_cohort.description: Farmer's perspective. Days from paddock to hub.

comparison_cohort.label: loop_prior_production_ready_0.944
comparison_cohort.primary_text:
Three months ago, Rachel Ward told me she was losing $2 on every kilo of beef she sold.

The wholesalers took their cut.

The supermarkets took theirs. Rachel got what was left.

Now her beef goes paddock to Brookvale hub in days. She earns more. Families eat better.

Be part of what we're building.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
comparison_cohort.headline: She was losing money on every kilo
comparison_cohort.description: Why we built a different model.
